coaching.title: Today's Run
coaching.message: Tuesday = quality day. Hit 8–10 × 3min at threshold (Z4, ~85–90% max HR) with 2min recovery jog between reps. Target ~6:30–6:45/km threshold pace depending on terrain. This isn't race pace yet—it's about holding controlled tension on tired legs after your weekend volume. The Julian Alps will demand sustained Z3–Z4 effort on the ascents, so reinforcing your lactate buffer now pays dividends. Keep total workout time under 60min including warm-up and cool-down.

coaching.title: Fuel Right
coaching.message: You're 108 days out in peak phase: prioritize glycogen. Eat 1.2–1.5g carb/kg body weight today spread across four meals, with emphasis on the 2–3 hours before your threshold session. A plain bagel or rice with banana 90min pre-run works. Post-run, consume 0.8–1.0g carb/kg plus 0.2–0.3g protein within 30min—chocolate milk, pasta, or rice bowl. Don't skimp: you're running 6 days/week under high load; under-fueling now will flat your adaptations and tank your September performance.

coaching.title: Recovery
coaching.message: Target 7–8 hours sleep tonight. You're mid-peak with accumulated fatigue; sleep is your biggest performance lever right now, not stretching. Given your travel schedule, treat sleep like a non-negotiable meeting: dark room, cool temp (16–18°C), phone off 30min before bed. If you're in a hotel, request a quiet floor and use earplugs. One poor night won't wreck your cycle, but chronic short sleep will—you're too experienced and too close to race day to coast on five hours.

coaching.title: Mental Edge
coaching.message: You're three weeks into peak. The legs will feel heavy today—that's the point. Threshold repeats on tired legs teach mental resilience for mile 25+ in the Alps when the terrain doesn't flatten and your quads are screaming. Embrace the discomfort, nail the numbers, then move on. No heroics, no extra reps. You're building a precise engine, not proving anything in June. Trust the plan: 108 days is still enough runway to peak at exactly the right moment.
